summary: The Get design pages API now returns page dimensions for pages in bounded designs (unbounded designs like whiteboards and Canva Docs will not have page dimensions).

title: The Get design export formats API is no longer in preview, and is now generally available.
The List brand templates API now supports an optional limit parameter to control the number of brand templates returned per request.
The List folder items API now supports a limit parameter to control the number of folder items returned per request.

title: Optional scopes have landed
summary: You can now mark individual OAuth scopes as optional when configuring your Slack app! Optional scopes give users more control over what data your app can access during installation, without blocking them from installing your app entirely.

title: Set status method scope update
summary: The assistant.threads.setStatus API method now accepts either the assistantwrite scope. This allows channel-based apps to use AI loading states in channels, without having to request assistantwrite scope in favor of the chat:write scope exclusively, so update your app soon!
